name: it is already too late
text:
the clock was always at midnight. you only just noticed.
set the Doomsday Clock to midnight. it has, in fact, always been midnight. retroactively put doom counters where doom counters should always have been.
everyone loses the game. then the player who has eaten the least wins, having clearly been preparing for this.
ignore the previous sentence. it was lying to you, gently, to soften the blow.
the end happens an infinite number of times, quickly. you get used to it.
flavorText: no flavor remains. it has all been consumed by the void. the void found it bland.

extras.fourthWall: least snacking player wins, then doesn't
